SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init

Class JavaProfile

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.AbstractProfile
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.JavaProfile
All Implemented Interfaces:
Profile
Direct Known Subclasses:
JavaInfFlowProfile, SimplifyTermProfile, SymbolicExecutionJavaProfile, WdProfile
public class JavaProfile extends AbstractProfile
This profile sets up KeY for verification of JavaCard programs.

      • Constant Field Values

    • defaultInstance

      public static JavaProfile defaultInstance

      The default instance of this class.

      It is typically used in the Thread of the user interface. Other instances of this class are typically only required to use them in different Threads (not the UI Thread).

    • defaultInstancePermissions

      public static JavaProfile defaultInstancePermissions

    • DEFAULT

      public static final StrategyFactory DEFAULT

      protected ImmutableList<TermLabelManager.TermLabelConfiguration> computeTermLabelConfiguration()
      Computes the TermLabelManager.TermLabelConfiguration to use in this Profile.

      computeTermLabelConfiguration in class AbstractProfile
      Returns:
      The TermLabelManager.TermLabelConfiguration to use in this Profile.

    • getStrategyFactories

    • initBuiltInRules

      protected ImmutableList<BuiltInRule> initBuiltInRules()
      Overrides:
      initBuiltInRules in class AbstractProfile

    • getOneStepSimpilifier

      public OneStepSimplifier getOneStepSimpilifier()

      Returns the OneStepSimplifier instance which should be used in this JavaProfile. It is added to the build in rules via initBuiltInRules().

      Sub profiles may exchange the OneStepSimplifier instance, for instance for site proofs used in the symbolic execution tree extraction.

      Returns:
      The OneStepSimplifier instance to use.

    • getJustification

      public RuleJustification getJustification(Rule r)
      determines the justification of rule r. For a method contract rule it returns a new instance of a ComplexRuleJustification otherwise the rule justification determined by the super class is returned
      Specified by:
      getJustification in interface Profile
      Overrides:
      getJustification in class AbstractProfile
      Parameters:
      r - the rule described above
      Returns:
      justification for the given rule

    • getDefaultStrategyFactory

      public StrategyFactory getDefaultStrategyFactory()
      the default strategy factory to be used
      Returns:
      the default strategy factory

    • getDefaultInstance

      public static JavaProfile getDefaultInstance(boolean perms)

      Returns the default instance of this class.

      It is typically used in the Thread of the user interface. Other instances of this class are typically only required to use them in different Threads (not the UI Thread).

      Parameters:
      perms - boolean to decide whether we use permissions
      Returns:
      The default instance for usage in the Thread of the user interface.

    • getDefaultInstance

      public static JavaProfile getDefaultInstance()

      public boolean withPermissions()
